DEPARTMENT ADDRESS
SACRAMENTO
95814

SENATE COMMITTEES
GOVERNMENTAL ORGANIZATION,
CHAIRMAN
EDUCATION

TRANSPORTATION, TRANSIT AND
ENERGY

ENERGY, CHAIRMAN
SOLAR AND NEW SOURCES OF
ENERGY, CHAIRMAN
SPECIAL COMMITTEE ON
TELEVISION, CHAIRMAN
SUBCOMMITTEE ON RAPID TRANSIT

DISTRICT OFFICE
312 W. COALTON BLVD.
MODESTO
GARDENA, CA 90247

RALPH C. DILLS
STATE SENATOR

DISTRICT OFFICE
312 W. COALTON BLVD.

CHAIRMAN
COMMITTEE ON GOVERNMENTAL ORGANIZATION

LIONEL B. CADE
FIELD REPRESENTATIVE

JOINT COMMITTEES
FAIRS ALLOCATION AND
CLASSIFICATION
SUBCOMMITTEE ON VOCATIONAL-
EDUCATION, CHAIRMAN

California State Senate

COMMISSIONS
ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

Democratic Caucus—Vice Chairman

June 14, 1976

Mr. Robert R. Stein
Executive Vice President
Western Fairs Association
2500 Stockton Boulevard
Sacramento, California 95816

Dear Mr. Stein:

I am returning the 1976 "VIP Admissions Credential"
which was sent to me by your office. I am returning
it in view of the fact that I am informed that it
might be considered as a gift by the Fair Practices
Commission and that I should report it.

I do not consider it a gift and will not report it.
I am, therefore, returning it to you for destruction
or disposition.

Sincerely,

RALPH C. DILLS

RCD:gk
Enclosure
cc: Fair Practices Commission

COMPTON, CA 90220

JOHN L. CADE

SUBCOMMITTEE ON VOCATIONAL
EDUCATION, CHAIRMAN

COMMISSIONS
ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
REHABILITATION TASK FORCE

Democratic Caucus—Vice Chairman

January 6, 1976

Mann Theatres Corporation of
California
9200 West Sunset Boulevard
Los Angeles, CA 90069

Gentlemen:

I am returning the Mann Theatres Season Pass which
was sent to me by your office. I am returning it in
view of the fact that I am informed that it might be
considered as a gift by the Fair Practices Commission
and that I should report it.

I do not consider it a gift and will not report it.
I am, therefore, returning it to you for destruction
or disposition.

Sincerely,

RALPH C. DILLS

RCD:K
Enclosure
cc: Fair Practices Commission

EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE
NATIONAL CONFERENCE OF STATE LEGISLATURES
